assertions.description: Design system: all color tokens defined and used consistently
Onboarding: all 6 screens from spec 5.2.1 implemented
Home dashboard: course carousel, daily lessons, mindmap, streaks
Conversation: markdown rendering, agent indicator, action chips
Course view: syllabus, lesson reader, progress tracker
Mindmap explorer: interactive graph with clickable nodes
Agent marketplace: browsable catalog with activation
Course marketplace: search, filter, detail, enroll
Profile & settings: goals, API keys, subscription, export, privacy
Accessibility: aria labels on all interactive elements
assertions.details: All components use aria-label, role, aria-pressed, aria-expanded

assertions.description: Dark mode: theme toggle renders and works
Vite build for fast initial load
All UI components have at least one test

test_output: 35 passed (35) in client, 214 total across all packages
command_run: npx turbo run test --force && npx tsc --noEmit && npx eslint .
